1 GCoin = 1 INR — Always

India's
Digital Currency

Buy, transfer, and redeem GCoin with seamless INR integration. Built on Polygon for lightning-fast, low-cost transactions.

Learn More
1:1 INRFully Collateralized
< 3sTransaction Speed
PolygonNetwork
Near ZeroGas Fees

Everything You Need

A complete stablecoin platform designed for the Indian market with world-class features.

Buy GCoin

Purchase GCoin instantly using Razorpay. Your INR is securely held in reserve.

P2P Transfer

Send GCoin to any wallet address instantly with near-zero gas fees on Polygon.

Redeem to INR

Convert GCoin back to INR directly to your bank account. Minimum ₹100.

Transaction History

Track all your buys, transfers, and redeems in one beautiful dashboard.

Bank-Grade Security

Your funds are protected with industry-standard encryption and smart contract audits.

Razorpay Integration

Seamless payment processing with India's leading payment gateway.

Transparent Reserves

Every GCoin is backed 1:1 by INR reserves. Fully auditable on-chain.

Non-Custodial

You control your keys. We never hold your private keys or seed phrases.

GCoin

India's premier INR-backed stablecoin on Polygon. Secure, fast, and compliant digital payments.
